parameters.query:
SELECT 
  a.association_id,
  a.herb_id,
  a.disease_id,
  hm.botanical_name,
  dm.sanskrit_name    AS disease_sanskrit,
  dm.english_name     AS disease_english,
  dm.disease_category AS category_name,
  a.prominence_score
FROM herb_disease_associations a 
JOIN herbs_master hm    ON a.herb_id   = hm.herb_id
JOIN diseases_master dm ON a.disease_id = dm.disease_id
WHERE hm.gbif_id         IS NOT NULL
  AND a.skip_reason      IS NULL
  AND a.association_type = 'indicated'
  AND a.last_study_search_at IS NULL
ORDER BY a.prominence_score DESC NULLS LAST, a.association_id;

-- ============================================================
-- AGENT 2: Final DB Node — Insert/Update PubMed Study
-- Logic fixes: count from real rows, direct association_id
-- ============================================================

INSERT INTO modern_studies_raw (
  pmid,
  herb_id,
  title,
  abstract,
  publication_date,
  journal,
  authors,
  doi,
  mesh_terms,
  fetched_at,
  processed,
  association_id,
  disease_id,
  publication_date_varchar,
  pubmed_url,
  is_new,
  study_classified
) VALUES (
  {{ $json.pmid || 0 }},
  {{ $json.herb_id }},
  '{{ $json.title_safe }}',
  '{{ $json.abstract_safe }}',
  '{{ $json.publication_date_varchar || "" }}',
  '{{ $json.journal_safe || "" }}',
  '{{ $json.authors_safe || "" }}',
  NULL,
  ARRAY[]::text[],
  '{{ $json.fetched_at }}'::timestamp,
  true,
  {{ $json.association_id }},
  {{ $json.disease_id }},
  '{{ $json.publication_date_varchar || "" }}',
  'https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/' || {{ $json.pmid || 0 }}::text,
  -- is_new: true only if this herb has never been PubMed-checked before
  NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM modern_studies_raw
    WHERE herb_id = {{ $json.herb_id }}
      AND pmid != {{ $json.pmid || 0 }}
  ),
  false
)
ON CONFLICT (pmid) DO UPDATE SET
  herb_id               = EXCLUDED.herb_id,
  title                 = EXCLUDED.title,
  abstract              = EXCLUDED.abstract,
  publication_date      = EXCLUDED.publication_date,
  journal               = EXCLUDED.journal,
  authors               = EXCLUDED.authors,
  doi                   = EXCLUDED.doi,
  mesh_terms            = EXCLUDED.mesh_terms,
  fetched_at            = EXCLUDED.fetched_at,
  processed             = EXCLUDED.processed,
  association_id        = EXCLUDED.association_id,
  disease_id            = EXCLUDED.disease_id,
  publication_date_varchar = EXCLUDED.publication_date_varchar,
  pubmed_url            = EXCLUDED.pubmed_url,
  is_new                = EXCLUDED.is_new,
  study_classified      = EXCLUDED.study_classified;

-- ── Update association: use direct association_id, count from real rows ──
UPDATE herb_disease_associations
SET
  study_search_status   = 'found_results',
  -- Real count from DB, not blindly incrementing
  study_search_count    = (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM modern_studies_raw
    WHERE association_id = {{ $json.association_id }}
  ),
  last_study_search_at  = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  study_search_source   = 'Agent2',
  study_search_notes    = 'PubMed study inserted/updated',
  updated_at            = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE association_id = {{ $json.association_id }};

INSERT INTO gap_scores (
  herb_id,
  category_id,
  last_pubmed_check,
  total_studies,
  papers_fetched_this_run,
  pair_fetched_complete
)
SELECT
  {{ $json.herb_id }},
  tc.category_id,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM modern_studies_raw msr
    JOIN herb_disease_associations hda
      ON msr.association_id = hda.association_id
    WHERE msr.herb_id = {{ $json.herb_id }}
      AND hda.disease_category = tc.category_name
  ),
  (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM modern_studies_raw
    WHERE association_id = {{ $json.association_id }}
  ),
  true
FROM therapeutic_categories tc
WHERE tc.category_name = '{{ $json.category_name }}'
ON CONFLICT (herb_id, category_id) DO UPDATE SET
  last_pubmed_check       = EXCLUDED.last_pubmed_check,
  total_studies           = EXCLUDED.total_studies,
  papers_fetched_this_run = EXCLUDED.papers_fetched_this_run,
  pair_fetched_complete   = EXCLUDED.pair_fetched_complete;

UPDATE herb_disease_associations
SET study_search_status = '{{ $json.sql_status }}',
    study_search_count = COALESCE(study_search_count, 0) + {{ $json.sql_count }},
    last_study_search_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    study_search_source = 'Agent2',
    study_search_notes = '{{ $json.sql_notes }}'
WHERE association_id = {{ $json.association_id }};

-- ── Existing gap_scores upsert ──────────────────────────────
INSERT INTO gap_scores (
  herb_id,
  category_id,
  last_pubmed_check,
  total_studies,
  papers_fetched_this_run,
  pair_fetched_complete
)
SELECT
  {{ $json.herb_id }},
  tc.category_id,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM modern_studies_raw msr
    JOIN herb_disease_associations hda
      ON msr.association_id = hda.association_id
    WHERE msr.herb_id = {{ $json.herb_id }}
      AND hda.disease_category = tc.category_name
  ),
  0,
  true
FROM therapeutic_categories tc
WHERE tc.category_name = '{{ $json.category_name }}'
ON CONFLICT (herb_id, category_id) DO UPDATE SET
  last_pubmed_check       = EXCLUDED.last_pubmed_check,
  total_studies           = EXCLUDED.total_studies,
  papers_fetched_this_run = EXCLUDED.papers_fetched_this_run,
  pair_fetched_complete   = EXCLUDED.pair_fetched_complete;

-- ── THIS IS WHAT WAS MISSING — stamps the association as done ──
UPDATE herb_disease_associations
SET
  study_search_status  = 'no_results',
  study_search_count   = 0,
  last_study_search_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  study_search_source  = 'Agent2',
  study_search_notes   = 'PubMed search completed — no papers found',
  updated_at           = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE association_id = {{ $json.association_id }};
